name: gipypowers
description: Canonical gipyware plugin: always-on caveman + ponytail plus the superpowers skill workflow, tuned for Codex (gpt-5.x) and token efficiency.

interface.longDescription: Always-on caveman (terse output) and ponytail (YAGNI, stdlib-first, smallest correct diff) plus the superpowers skill workflow — brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, review — tuned for Codex and a 10% context budget.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
